access.guest_fallback_message: Detailed explanations are available for logged-in Saola students only.

q39.explanation: Cần điền/chọn thông tin đúng từ bài đọc. Ở đoạn F, bài viết nêu: "Next, the fibres are boiled for 2 - 6 hours, and are turned every so often. When finished, the fibres are washed in fresh water to remove impurities and then small particles or specks are removed by hand. The fibres are beaten in a blender, creating a creamy pulp.". Cụm a creamy pulp khớp với yêu cầu câu hỏi và đúng giới hạn từ nếu đề có quy định.
q39.evidence: Next, the fibres are boiled for 2 - 6 hours, and are turned every so often. When finished, the fibres are washed in fresh water to remove impurities and then small particles or specks are removed by hand. The fibres are beaten in a blender, creating a creamy pulp._

q40.explanation: Cần điền/chọn thông tin đúng từ bài đọc. Ở đoạn F, bài viết nêu: "At this stage, dyes can be added to create coloured papers. The pulp is then poured into a large tub and the fibres are suspended in the water. Framed screens are lowered into the water and then lifted to the surface catching the fibres on the screen.". Cụm framed screens khớp với yêu cầu câu hỏi và đúng giới hạn từ nếu đề có quy định.
q40.evidence: At this stage, dyes can be added to create coloured papers. The pulp is then poured into a large tub and the fibres are suspended in the water. Framed screens are lowered into the water and then lifted to the surface catching the fibres on the screen._
